property.name: tez.lib.uris
property.description: Path to TEZ libraries in HDFS for YARN container localization

property.name: tez.use.cluster.hadoop-libs
property.description: Use Hadoop jars from cluster nodes instead of packaging them in tez.tar.gz

property.name: tez.am.resource.memory.mb
property.description: Memory for the TEZ Application Master container

property.name: tez.am.launch.cmd-opts
property.description: Java opts for the TEZ Application Master

property.name: tez.task.resource.memory.mb
property.description: Memory for each TEZ task container

property.name: tez.task.launch.cmd-opts
property.description: Java opts for TEZ task containers

property.name: tez.grouping.min-size
property.description: Minimum group size for input splits (16 MB)

property.name: tez.grouping.max-size
property.description: Maximum group size for input splits (1 GB)

property.name: tez.tez-ui.history-url.base
property.description: Base URL for the TEZ UI, used to generate links from YARN

property.name: tez.allow.disabled.timeline-domains
property.description: Allow TEZ to work when timeline domains are not enabled
